title: Jack Mallers steps down as XXI Capital CEO as Tether's plans to merge three bitcoin firms falls
summary: The proposed three-way merger between Twenty One Capital, Mallers' Strike, and Elektron Energy has been abandoned.

title: Bitcoin rally has broad-based support as institutions, whales, options traders pile in
Clarity odds jump to 43% on Polymarket after unverified reports Trump agreed to ethics deal
summary: Bettors moved the crypto market structure bill to a 43% chance of passing this year, up from a record low last week, though the reports remain unconfirmed and no bill text has appeared.

title: Crypto markets rally on Clarity progress report, Asian chip-stock rebound
summary: Speculation that President Donald Trump agreed to a crucial ethics provision for the crypto market structure bill underpinned the gains.

title: XRP jumps 4% as traders watch 'triangle breakout' toward $1.35
summary: XRP pushed higher over 24 hours and tested short-term resistance, but the larger chart still needs a clean break above the $1.24-$1.28 supply zone to confirm a stronger reversal.
